zh.lifeSummary: 當Joseph Root於1640年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德法明頓時，他的父親Thomas Root Sr.35歲，母親Elizabeth Gale22歲。他於1660年12月30日與Hannah Haynes在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1711年4月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joseph Root于1640年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德法明頓时，他的父亲Thomas Root Sr.35岁，母亲Elizabeth Gale22岁。他于1660年12月30日与Hannah Haynes在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1711年4月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Root
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a nickname for a cheerful person, from an unrecorded Middle English rote (Old English rōt) ‘glad, cheerful’.

English: from Middle English rote, route, rotte ‘rote’ (of uncertain origin but apparently ultimately akin to Welsh crwth), perhaps used for a player of the medieval stringed instrument, a kind of harp or fiddle. Compare Rutter .
English: perhaps a habitational name from Wroot (Lincolnshire), from Old English wrōt ‘snout, spur of land’.

variants.name: Rooth
meanings: English: habitational name from Rowarth in New Mills (Derbyshire), from Old English rūh ‘rough’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Rutter
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French roteor, roteeur, routeeur ‘player on the rote’, a musical instrument, a kind of harp or fiddle. The regular modern development of the name would have been to Roter (rhyming with boater), and to Router or Rowter (rhyming with doubter). These variants survive in small numbers, but the principal modern form is Rutter, found in fairly large numbers across England, especially in the northeast and in the West Midlands. The shortened vowel in Rutter may have been influenced by rotte, rutte, Middle English variants of Old French rote. Compare Root 2.

English: nickname from Middle English roter, rotour ‘robber, plunderer’, also ‘scoundrel, lecher’, a borrowing of Old French rotier, Anglo-Norman French routier ‘soldier of fortune; robber, highwayman, ruffian’, though this is a less likely source of the modern surname.
Dutch: nickname from Middle Dutch rut(t)er ‘freebooter, footpad’, cognate with 2 above.

variants.name: Rutt
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Root  .
German (Rütt): from a short form of the personal name Rudolf .

variants.name: Roots
meanings: English (Kent): variant of Root , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

historicEvents.description: """Farmington was originally inhabited by the Tunxis Indian tribe. In June of 1640, a community of English immigrants was established by residents of Hartford, making Farmington the oldest inland settlement west of the Connecticut River and the twelfth oldest community in the state."" Wikipedia"

en.lifeSummary: When Joseph Root was born in 1640, in Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas Root Sr., was 35 and his mother, Elizabeth Gale, was 22. He married Hannah Haynes on 30 December 1660, in Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 April 1711, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joseph Root est né en 1640, à Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Root Sr., avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Gale, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Haynes le 30 décembre 1660, à Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 avril 1711, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 71 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Root è nato il nel 1640 nel Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Thomas Root Sr., aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Gale, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Haynes il 30 dicembre 1660, nel Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 aprile 1711, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joseph Rootが1640年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードファルミントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Root Sr.は35歳，母Elizabeth Galeは22歳であった。1660年12月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーサンプトンでHannah Haynesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1711年4月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joseph Root(이)가 1640년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 패밍턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Root Sr.(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Gale(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1660년 12월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르섬프턴에서 Hannah Haynes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1711년 4월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Root nasceu em 1640, em Farmington, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Root Sr., tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Gale, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Haynes em 30 de dezembro de 1660, em Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de abril de 1711, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 71 anos.

ru.Farmington, Hartford, Colony of Connecti: фармингтон, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joseph Root родился в 1640 г. в местности фармингтон, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas Root Sr. было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Gale, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Haynes 30 декабря 1660 г. в местности нортамптон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 апреля 1711 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joseph Root nació en 1640, en Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Root Sr., tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Gale, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Hannah Haynes el 30 de diciembre de 1660, en Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de abril de 1711, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 71 años.
